name: activator-authoring-cli
description: > Create alerts, notifications, and automated actions on Fabric data and events via Fabric REST API and `az rest` CLI. **Invoke this skill** whenever the user wants to: (1) create, update, or delete an alert or notification flow, (2) send a Teams message, email, or run a Fabric item when something happens, (3) connect alert logic to Eventhouse, Eventstream, Real-time Hub, or DTB / Ontology data, (4) adjust thresholds, filters, event triggers, or actions, (5) troubleshoot or change an existing Ac
author: microsoft
